validation_results.command: python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; root=Path('build_program/phases/P2/candidates/P2-SPEC-03'); bundle=json.loads((root/'P2_SPEC_LOCK_INPUT_BUNDLE.json').read_text()); index=json.loads((root/'P2_IMPLEMENTATION_WORKPACK_INDEX.json').read_text()); tests=json.loads((root/'P2_TEST_OBLIGATION_MATRIX.json').read_text()); criteria=json.loads((root/'P2_SPEC_LOCK_READINESS_CRITERIA.json').read_text()); report=json.loads((root/'P2_SPEC_LOCK_READINESS_REPORT.json').read_text()); assert len(bundle['required_spec_candidates'])==3; assert bundle['required_spec_candidates'][0]['approval_state']=='APPROVED_BY_HUMAN'; assert bundle['required_spec_candidates'][1]['approval_state']=='APPROVED_BY_HUMAN'; assert bundle['required_spec_candidates'][2]['approval_state']=='APPROVED_BY_HUMAN'; assert bundle['required_spec_candidates'][2]['review_binding_status']=='BOUND_BY_REVIEW_DECISION_SUPPORTING_OUTPUT'; assert bundle['pending_candidate_hash_resolution']['approval_processed'] is True; assert len(index['implementation_workpacks'])==5; assert all(w['readiness_state']=='WAITING_P2_SPEC_LOCK' for w in index['implementation_workpacks']); assert all(w['path_coverage_status']=='PASS' for w in index['implementation_workpacks']); assert tests['obligation_count']==len(tests['obligations'])==10; assert all(o['owning_implementation_workpacks'] and o['path_coverage_status']=='PASS' for o in tests['obligations']); assert criteria['not_a_lock'] is True; assert criteria['lock_creation_allowed_now'] is False; assert report['readiness_status']=='APPROVED_FOR_SPEC_LOCK_CREATION_NOT_LOCKED'; assert report['human_review_summary']['p2_spec_03_review_status']=='APPROVED_BY_HUMAN'; print('PASS')"

validation_results.command:
python3 -c "import fnmatch,json; from pathlib import Path; root=Path('build_program/phases/P2/candidates/P2-SPEC-03'); idx=json.loads((root/'P2_IMPLEMENTATION_WORKPACK_INDEX.json').read_text()); contracts=json.loads(Path('build_program/phases/P2/candidates/P2-SPEC-02/P2_ARTIFACT_FIELD_CONTRACTS.json').read_text()); artifact={a['artifact_id']:a['path'] for a in contracts['artifact_contracts']};

def covered(path, patterns):
    return any(fnmatch.fnmatchcase(path, pat) or (pat.endswith('/**') and (path==pat[:-3] or path.startswith(pat[:-3] + '/'))) for pat in patterns)
prev=[]
for w in idx['implementation_workpacks']:
    allowed=w['allowed_write_paths_after_lock']
    assert all(covered(p, allowed) for p in w['code_targets']), w['workpack_id']
    assert all(covered(p, allowed) for p in w['test_targets']), w['workpack_id']
    assert all(covered(artifact[a], allowed) for a in w['required_artifact_ids']), w['workpack_id']
    assert w['requires_completed_workpacks']==prev, w['workpack_id']
    assert w['write_path_coverage']['code_targets_covered_by_allowed_write_paths_after_lock'] is True
    assert w['write_path_coverage']['required_artifact_paths_covered_by_allowed_write_paths_after_lock'] is True
    assert w['write_path_coverage']['test_targets_covered_by_allowed_write_paths_after_lock'] is True
    prev.append(w['workpack_id'])
print('PASS')"
validation_results.summary: every code target, test target, and required artifact path is covered by allowed write paths; implementation dependencies are machine-readable and monotonic

validation_results.command: python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; root=Path('build_program/phases/P2/candidates/P2-SPEC-03'); bundle=json.loads((root/'P2_SPEC_LOCK_INPUT_BUNDLE.json').read_text()); rows=bundle['lock_input_files']; assert all(r['sha256'] or r['candidate_id']=='P2-SPEC-03' for r in rows); assert all(r['input_kind'] not in ('generated_output_pending_hash','review_decision_pending_hash') or r['candidate_id']=='P2-SPEC-03' for r in rows); policy=bundle['pending_candidate_hash_resolution']; assert 'must not copy null sha256' in policy['actual_lock_rule']; assert policy['approval_processed'] is True; assert policy['human_review_status']=='APPROVED_BY_HUMAN'; print('PASS')"
